name: GoCardless Direct Debit Import
description: Collect payments via GoCardless Direct Debit, match to customer invoices, post receipts to the accounting system.

accounting_system.description: Connection to Opera SQL SE or equivalent accounting database

email.purpose: Monitor for GoCardless payout notification emails, send payment confirmations
email.description: IMAP for receiving, SMTP for sending

gocardless_api.description: GoCardless API for payment creation, mandate management, payout retrieval

settings.label: Destination Bank Account Code
settings.description: Opera bank account that receives GoCardless payouts

settings.label: GoCardless Control Bank Code
settings.description: Intermediate bank if using two-stage posting

settings.label: Fees Nominal Account
settings.description: Nominal code for GoCardless fee charges

data_stores.description: Mandate links, payment requests, subscription tracking

locking_rules.bank_import_lock: Application-level lock per bank account — prevents concurrent imports to same bank (import_lock module)
locking_rules.sequence_allocation: UPDLOCK, ROWLOCK on nparm (journal numbers), atype (entry numbers), nextid (row IDs)
locking_rules.balance_update: ROWLOCK on nbank, sname, nacnt when updating balances
locking_rules.deadlock_retry: All posting wrapped in execute_with_deadlock_retry (3 attempts, exponential backoff)
locking_rules.read_queries: All SELECT queries use WITH (NOLOCK) — no read locks
locking_rules.duplicate_prevention: Check existing payments in local DB + GoCardless API before creating new request
